Container.Name: binhex-gamarr
Container.Overview: gamarr finds great games and puts them in your library — no browsing, no manual searches, no cleanup. A configurable pipeline scrapes Metacritic for critically-acclaimed releases, filters out unwanted genres and keywords, matches titles against FitGirl repacks and FreeGOGPCGames, and delivers torrents to qBittorrent. Once downloads complete, a post-processing thread SHA-256-verifies and copies each game to your library with customizable path templates, then cleans up source torrents. Runs as a daemon so your library stays fresh without lifting a finger.
Container.Requires:
Requires a running qBittorrent instance (binhex-qbittorrent recommended). Set GAMARR_QBT_HOST/PORT/USERNAME/PASSWORD to match.
For post-processing (copying completed downloads to a media library), map your library path into this container and set GAMARR_LIBRARY_PATH to the container path(s).
IMPORTANT - Please ensure you edit /config/gamarr/config/gamarr.yml after the initial startup.
Container.DonateText: If you appreciate my work, then please consider buying me a beer :D

Config.Name: Path: /config
Config.Description: Container path for gamarr configuration file (gamarr.yml), database, and logs.

Config.Name: Path: /media
Config.Description: Container path to your media library root. gamarr copies completed games here during post-processing. Set GAMARR_LIBRARY_PATH to the relevant sub-path(s) inside this mount (e.g. /media/Games).

Config.Name: Path: /data
Config.Description: Container path to the qBittorrent completed downloads directory. gamarr reads source files from here during post-processing before calling qBittorrent to remove the torrent.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Console log level. Set to DEBUG when troubleshooting. Overrides general.log_level_console in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_LIBRARY_PATH
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of container paths to your media library. Used to detect already-owned games and as the post-processing copy destination. Example: /media/Games,/media/Games-4K. Overrides general.library_path_list in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_QBT_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname or IP address of the qBittorrent WebUI. If both containers share a Docker network use the container name; for host networking use 'localhost'. Overrides torrent_client.qbittorrent.host in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_QBT_PORT
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI port. Overrides torrent_client.qbittorrent.port in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_QBT_USERNAME
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI username. Overrides torrent_client.qbittorrent.username in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_QBT_PASSWORD
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI password. Overrides torrent_client.qbittorrent.password in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_CONFIG_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the gamarr YAML configuration file. Change only if you need the config file in a non-standard location.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_DB_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the gamarr SQLite history database. Overrides general.db_path in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_LOG_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the gamarr log file. Leave empty to disable file logging. Overrides general.log_path in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: GAMARR_PID_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the gamarr PID file. Overrides general.pid_path in gamarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: ENABLE_STARTUP_SCRIPTS
Config.Description: Specify whether to run startup scripts to install and/or configure additional applications.

Config.Name: Variable: ENABLE_HEALTHCHECK
Config.Description: Enable or disable healthchecks.

Config.Name: Variable: HEALTHCHECK_COMMAND
Config.Description: The command or script to execute for healthchecks; defaults to healthcheck.sh if unset.

Config.Name: Variable: HEALTHCHECK_ACTION
Config.Description: Action to execute on healthcheck failure; defaults to 'exit 1'. Set to 'kill 1' to restart the container on failure.

Config.Name: Variable: HEALTHCHECK_HOSTNAME
Config.Description: Hostname used for DNS and HTTPS healthchecking.

Config.Name: Variable: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for the running container.

Config.Name: Variable: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for the running container.

Config.Name: Variable: UMASK
Config.Description: UMASK for the running container.
